problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics may resolve Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
